welcomeMessage: To Greeshmaa, on your special day

letters.label: Letter 1
letters.title: To Greeshma Chanduri
letters.content:
I know you don't like when i call you Greeshma(hold on to that happy face till the end). Like always  I felt an unconditional attachment towards you & i don't how but it stayed  with me.I never thought i would ever feel this emotionally connected to someone.even staying miles apart

Every single memory with you is special to me and i want to tell you how much you mean to me.

Not because we're always doing something big or exciting, but because it's you.

Looking at you, I feel like I'm home and always remember i am here! beside you for you.

letters.label: Letter 3
letters.title: Wishing you all the happiness and a year filled with love paisal and me
letters.message: may all ur wish comes true.
